properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everybody falls sometimes Gotta find the strength to rise From the ashes And make a new beginning

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Anyone can feel the ache You think it's more than you can take But you're stronger Stronger than you know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don't you give up now The sun will soon be shining You gotta face the clouds To find the silver lining

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've seen dreams that move the mountains Hope that doesn't ever end Even when the sky is falling I've seen miracles just happen Silent prayers get answered Broken hearts become brand new That's what faith can do

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It doesn't matter what you've heard Impossible is not a word It's just a reason For someone not to try

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Everybody's scared to death When they decide to take that step Out on the water It'll be alright

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Life is so much more Than what your eyes are seeing You will find your way If you keep believing

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I've seen dreams that move the mountains Hope that doesn't ever end Even when the sky is falling I've seen miracles just happen Silent prayers get answered Broken hearts become brand new That's what faith can do

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Overcome the odds You don't have a chance (That's what faith can do) When the world says you can't It'll tell you that you can

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I've seen dreams that move the mountains Hope that doesn't ever end Even when the sky is falling And I've seen miracles just happen Silent prayers get answered Broken hearts become brand new That's what faith can do That's what faith can do

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Even if you fall sometimes You will have the strength to rise
